findings.title: Wednesday briefing: How much longer can Keir Starmer cling to power?
findings.summary: In today’s newsletter: A leadership crisis once again grips Westminster, with the Labour party currently split, the prime minister may not last the weekGood morning. First as tragedy, then as farce. Once again, the UK is shrouded in political uncertainty as a deeply unpopular prime minister clings to power. It has become a familiar cycle in recent years: the wait to find out which perishable good will survive longer than our next doomed premier.Keir Starmer insists he is not leaving – a serio...
findings.text: Wednesday briefing: How much longer can Keir Starmer cling to power? | In today’s newsletter: A leadership crisis once again grips Westminster, with the Labour party currently split, the prime minister may not last the weekGood morning. First as tragedy, then as farce. Once again, the UK is shrouded in political uncertainty as a deeply unpopular prime minister clings to power. It has become a familiar cycle in recent years: the wait to find out which perishable good will survive longer than our next doomed premier.Keir Starmer insists he is not leaving – a serio...

findings.title: Labour-supporting unions predict Starmer will not lead party into next election
findings.summary: Exclusive: Leaked draft statement says party ‘cannot continue on its current path’ under PMKeir Starmer will not lead his party into the next general election, Labour-supporting unions have predicted, in an intervention that threatens to further destabilise the prime minister after a damaging few days.The 11 Labour-affiliated unions – which include Unite, Unison and the GMB – are expected to issue a joint statement on Wednesday saying “at some stage” the party will have to put a plan in place...

findings.title: Besieged Starmer seeks to heal Labour divisions in King's Speech
findings.summary: King Charles III will on Wednesday outline UK leader Keir Starmer's next legislative plans, during a pomp-filled ceremony that could have huge repercussions for the embattled prime minister's future.

findings.title: Starmer faces calls to quit: “Step aside or give No 10 to Nigel Farage,” says former Labour adviser
findings.summary: Growing pressure is mounting on the British Prime Minister, Keir Starmer to resign following his party’s poor performance in last week’s local elections. Nearly 90 Labour MPs are calling for him to step down, while several members of his cabinet have resigned. At the same time, 110 Labour MPs have signed a statement backing him. In the face of all that pressure, Starmer is arguing his resignation would usher in chaos for the country. France 24’s Monte Francis is joined by Matthew Torbitt, for...
findings.text: Starmer faces calls to quit: “Step aside or give No 10 to Nigel Farage,” says former Labour adviser | Growing pressure is mounting on the British Prime Minister, Keir Starmer to resign following his party’s poor performance in last week’s local elections. Nearly 90 Labour MPs are calling for him to step down, while several members of his cabinet have resigned. At the same time, 110 Labour MPs have signed a statement backing him. In the face of all that pressure, Starmer is arguing his resignation would usher in chaos for the country. France 24’s Monte Francis is joined by Matthew Torbitt, for...

findings.title: UK: Keir Starmer tells Cabinet he will continue in place, as four junior ministers quit
findings.summary: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer has met with his Cabinet amid continued pressure after election losses. A set piece speech yesterday failed to calm the waters, and four junior ministers resigned on Tuesday.
findings.text: UK: Keir Starmer tells Cabinet he will continue in place, as four junior ministers quit | British Prime Minister Keir Starmer has met with his Cabinet amid continued pressure after election losses. A set piece speech yesterday failed to calm the waters, and four junior ministers resigned on Tuesday.

findings.title: UK PM Starmer fights for political survival as calls for his resignation grow
findings.summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer said he had no plans to resign on Tuesday after facing growing calls within his party to step down following dismal general election results for Labour.
findings.text: UK PM Starmer fights for political survival as calls for his resignation grow | UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer said he had no plans to resign on Tuesday after facing growing calls within his party to step down following dismal general election results for Labour.

findings.title: Debatte über möglichen Rücktritt Starmers spaltet Labour
findings.summary: Der britische Premier Starmer will im Amt bleiben, um das Land vor Chaos zu bewahren. Doch die Debatte um einen möglichen Rücktritt spaltet seine Labour-Partei. Davon profitieren könnte vor allem eine andere Partei. Von Franziska Hoppen.
findings.text: Debatte über möglichen Rücktritt Starmers spaltet Labour | Der britische Premier Starmer will im Amt bleiben, um das Land vor Chaos zu bewahren. Doch die Debatte um einen möglichen Rücktritt spaltet seine Labour-Partei. Davon profitieren könnte vor allem eine andere Partei. Von Franziska Hoppen.

findings.title: Britischer Premier Starmer weist Rücktrittsforderungen von sich
findings.summary: Die Debatte über einen möglichen Rücktritt des britischen Premiers Starmer spaltet die Labour-Partei. Drei Staatssekretärinnen und ein Staatssekretär sind inzwischen zurückgetreten. Doch es gibt auch viel Unterstützung für Starmer.
findings.text: Britischer Premier Starmer weist Rücktrittsforderungen von sich | Die Debatte über einen möglichen Rücktritt des britischen Premiers Starmer spaltet die Labour-Partei. Drei Staatssekretärinnen und ein Staatssekretär sind inzwischen zurückgetreten. Doch es gibt auch viel Unterstützung für Starmer.

findings.title: Britischer Premierminister Starmer will im Amt bleiben
findings.summary: Der britische Premierminister und Labour-Chef trotzt den Rücktrittsforderungen aus den eigenen Reihen. Er wolle weiterregieren, sagte Starmer. In der Kabinettssitzung blieb ein Aufstand offenbar aus.
findings.text: Britischer Premierminister Starmer will im Amt bleiben | Der britische Premierminister und Labour-Chef trotzt den Rücktrittsforderungen aus den eigenen Reihen. Er wolle weiterregieren, sagte Starmer. In der Kabinettssitzung blieb ein Aufstand offenbar aus.

findings.title: Amid political turmoil at home, UK remains 'resolutely behind Ukraine,' minister tells Kyiv Independent
findings.summary: The U.K's governing Labour Party suffered losses in the country's May 7 local elections, which are leading to calls for Prime Minister Keir Starmer to resign, but Ukrainians should not worry about continued support, Europe Minister Stephen Doughty told the Kyiv Independent in an interview

findings.title: 2027: British govt has no preferred candidate, says Envoy
findings.summary:
By Demola Akinyemi Ilorin —British Deputy High Commissioner in Nigeria, Gill Lever, said yesterday the British government had no preferred candidate in the 2027 general elections in Nigeria. The  envoy, who  stated this while on a courtesy visit to Kwara State governor and Chairman of Nigeria Governors’ Forum, NGF, AbdulRahman AbdulRazaq, at Government House, Ilorin, said […]
The post 2027: British govt has no preferred candidate, says Envoy appeared first on Vanguard News.

findings.title: El histórico discurso de Churchill al asumir como primer ministro para dar batalla al nazismo: “Sin victoria, no hay supervivencia”
findings.summary: Apenas tres días después de llegar al poder, Winston Churchill pronunció ante la Cámara de los Comunes el discurso que preparó a Gran Bretaña para la guerra total contra la Alemania nazi. Cómo construyó la célebre frase “sangre, esfuerzo, sudor y lágrimas” y por qué, en medio del derrumbe europeo de 1940, eligió hablarle al país sin promesas ni eufemismos.
findings.text: El histórico discurso de Churchill al asumir como primer ministro para dar batalla al nazismo: “Sin victoria, no hay supervivencia” | Apenas tres días después de llegar al poder, Winston Churchill pronunció ante la Cámara de los Comunes el discurso que preparó a Gran Bretaña para la guerra total contra la Alemania nazi. Cómo construyó la célebre frase “sangre, esfuerzo, sudor y lágrimas” y por qué, en medio del derrumbe europeo de 1940, eligió hablarle al país sin promesas ni eufemismos.

findings.title: Royaume Uni: malgré les appels à la démission, Keir Starmer s'accroche à son poste
findings.summary: Le Parlement britannique se prépare à la cérémonie de l’année, toute en traditions et en protocoles : ce mercredi 13 mai dans l'après-midi, Sa Majesté le roi Charles III prononce son discours annuel, qui marque le début de l’année parlementaire et détaille le calendrier législatif des mois à venir. Cette année, le King’s Speech se tient dans une drôle d’ambiance pour le Premier ministre Keir Starmer. Une semaine après des élections locales désastreuses pour le parti travailliste, et après plu...
